    the current animation effect associated to this element.
    Animation - Class in boardifier.model.animation
     
    Animation(Model, int) - Constructor for class boardifier.model.animation.Animation
     
    Animation(Model, int, int) - Constructor for class boardifier.model.animation.Animation
     
    AnimationCallback - Interface in boardifier.model.animation
     
    animationName - Variable in class boardifier.model.action.GameAction
     
    AnimationState - Class in boardifier.model.animation
     
    AnimationState() - Constructor for class boardifier.model.animation.AnimationState
     
    animationStep - Variable in class boardifier.model.animation.Animation
     
    AnimationStep - Class in boardifier.model.animation
    boardifier.model.Animation.AnimationStep is a simple wrapper to represent a step of an boardifier.model.Animation.Animation In case of boardifier.model.Animation.MoveAnimation, data will contain 2D/3D coordinates of the next position In case of a LookAnimation, data will contain some parameters to modify the visual aspect.
    AnimationStep() - Constructor for class boardifier.model.animation.AnimationStep
     
    AnimationStep(List) - Constructor for class boardifier.model.animation.AnimationStep
     
    animationType - Variable in class boardifier.model.action.GameAction

    ClassicBoardLook - Class in boardifier.view
    ClassicBoardLook is a chess like board, with optional coordinate system to show, using A, B, C for columns and 1, 2, ... for rows.
    ClassicBoardLook(int, int, ContainerElement, int, int, boolean) - Constructor for class boardifier.view.ClassicBoardLook

    endGame() - Method in class boardifier.control.Controller
    Execute actions at the end of the game.
    endOfTurn() - Method in class boardifier.control.Controller
    Execute actions when the current player just ended its turn By default, this method does nothing because what to do is totally dependent of the game and its state.

    G

    GameAction - Class in boardifier.model.action
     
    GameAction(Model, GameElement, String) - Constructor for class boardifier.model.action.GameAction
     
    GameElement - Class in boardifier.model
    abstract class that describes an element of the game, in the largest sense.
    GameElement(double, double, GameStageModel) - Constructor for class boardifier.model.GameElement
    It calls the general constructor but with the location at x,y and a type set to basic.
    GameElement(double, double, GameStageModel, int) - Constructor for class boardifier.model.GameElement
    Set all attributes of the gameElement.
    GameElement(GameStageModel) - Constructor for class boardifier.model.GameElement
    Basic constructor.
    GameElement(GameStageModel, int) - Constructor for class boardifier.model.GameElement
    It calls the general constructor but with a location at 0,0 and the given type.

    the game stage that owns this element

    gameStageModel - Variable in class boardifier.view.GameStageView
    The assocaited game stage model Obviously, the model must be instantiated BEFORE the game stage.

    onFaceChange() - Method in class boardifier.view.ElementLook
     
    onLocationChange() - Method in class boardifier.view.ElementLook
    By default, if the element moves, there is nothing special to do for its look because it will be placed in the viewport taking the element x,y position int account, or by using a layout.

    onPutInContainer(ContainerOpCallback) - Method in class boardifier.model.GameStageModel
     
    onRemoveFromContainer(ContainerOpCallback) - Method in class boardifier.model.GameStageModel
     
    onSelectionChange() - Method in class boardifier.view.ElementLook
    by default, do nothing because there is little chance that a text-mode game allows to "select" an element.

    render() - Method in class boardifier.view.ClassicBoardLook
    overrides default method that does nothing, because as soon as the GridLook is created, the space dedicated to the look is already fixed.
    render() - Method in class boardifier.view.ContainerLook
     
    render() - Method in class boardifier.view.ElementLook
    render() is used to create the visual shape of the element.
    render() - Method in class boardifier.view.GridLook
    overrides default method that does nothing, because as soon as the GridLook is created, the space dedicated to the look is already fixed.
    render() - Method in class boardifier.view.TableLook
    overrides default method that does nothing, because as soon as the TableLook is created, if there are some row/cols that have a fixed size, they must be "visible" on screen
    render() - Method in class boardifier.view.TextLook
     
    renderBorders() - Method in class boardifier.view.GridLook
     
    renderBorders() - Method in class boardifier.view.TableLook

    RESET - Static variable in class boardifier.view.ConsoleColor
     
    resetReachableCells(boolean) - Method in class boardifier.model.ContainerElement
    Since boardifierconsole is in text mode, the default behaviour is to have no special rendering for cells that can be reached, after for example, selecting an element that should be played.
    resetReachableCells(boolean, boolean) - Method in class boardifier.model.ContainerElement
